heading: Integration of procedure with Securities Act and other Acts
label: 77hhh Integration of procedure with Securities Act and other Acts

children.heading: Incorporation by reference
children.label: a Incorporation by reference
children.text: The Commission, by such rules and regulations or orders as it deems necessary or appropriate in the public interest or for the protection of investors, shall authorize the filing of any information or documents required to be filed with the Commission under this subchapter, or under the Securities Act of 1933 [ et seq.] or the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 [ et seq.], by incorporating by reference any information or documents on file with the Commission under this subchapter or under any such Act.15 U.S.C. 77a15 U.S.C. 78a

children.heading: Consolidation of applications, reports, etc.
children.label: b Consolidation of applications, reports, etc.
children.text: The Commission, by such rules and regulations or orders as it deems necessary or appropriate in the public interest or for the protection of investors, shall provide for the consolidation of applications, reports, and proceedings under this subchapter with registration statements, applications, reports, and proceedings under the Securities Act of 1933 [ et seq.] or the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 [ et seq.].15 U.S.C. 77a15 U.S.C. 78a
